title: Modern Retail+ Research: Marketers hesitate to adopt AI for influencer and CTV marketing
description: Advertisers are embracing AI for social media and retail media marketing. However, they are slower to adopt AI for influencer and CTV marketing. This is according to a Modern Retail+ Research survey of more than 100 marketing professionals in first-quarter 2026.

title: WTF is SPUR’s publisher-run Content Telemetry Framework?
description: SPUR is publisher‑run and fixated on one thing: turning AI’s use of their content from opaque scraping into a transparent, usage‑based licensing system they control.

title: NASCAR rebuilds its commercial engine to tempt back motorsports fans
description: Behind the scenes, the motorsport and racetrack business hopes a commercial refit and consumer-facing hero campaign can help it hold the line amid F1’s growing U.S. popularity.

title: Intent Clusters Guide AI Product Discovery
description:
AI's growth in search and shopping adds precision to intent behaviors and opportunities.
The post Intent Clusters Guide AI Product Discovery appeared first on Practical Ecommerce.

title: After the click: Turning AI-referred shoppers into loyal customers
description: AI that truly assists creates loyalty. Without it, stores are discovered but quickly forgotten.

title: Why Farmers Insurance flipped its jingle as part of all-pink rebrand
description: The effort is intended to help the brand stand out amid a “sea of sameness” in the insurance category, said Eleanor Solomon, head of creative at the brand.

title: DTC brands are finding growth with older customers
description: DTC brands like Little Spoon and Boarderie are adjusting their marketing to win over older consumers like grandparents and Boomer parents.

title: Ways to think about token pricing
description:
AI is in a supply crunch today, but what happens when we come out of it? 
How and where will supply, demand, price, capacity and capex get back into 
equilibrium? Today, model labs can name their price, but why won’t they end 
up as low-margin commodity infrastructure?

title: Capturing token IDs during agentic interactions for better reinforcement learning
description: A new Rust proxy called Turnstile sits between the model backend and the agent harness to capture information lost in mere text transcripts.

title: GPT-5.6 is now the preferred model in Microsoft 365 Copilot
description: Learn how GPT-5.6 powers Microsoft 365 Copilot with stronger AI capabilities across Word, Excel, PowerPoint, Chat, and Cowork for faster, higher-quality work.

title: GPT-5.6: Frontier intelligence that scales with your ambition
description: More intelligence from every token, stronger performance per dollar, and more capability on demand for your hardest work.

title: ChatGPT is now a partner for your most ambitious work
description: ChatGPT Work is an agent that can take action across your apps and files, stay with a project for hours if needed, and turn a goal into finished work.

title: GPT-5.5 Bio Bug Bounty
description: Details about the OpenAI Bio Bounty program

title: IBM Extends Bob AI Platform With Array of New Features
description: The updates amount to a significant expansion of the platform.

title: Grok 4.5 Is SpaceXAI’s First Real Entry Into the Enterprise
description: The model release is the first since SpaceX went public in June and will help SpaceXAI compete with other frontier model providers, particularly in coding.
